utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each item also provides the details as requested: 1) health_coverage specifies the type (physical and mental health) and cost (€550/month, combined with travel). 2) property_coverage specifies what is covered (home contents, fine art, electronics) and cost (€80.75/month). 3) travel_coverage specifies coverage type (global, adventure sports, medical evacuation, business travel protection) and cost (€550/month, combined with health). 4) additional_services lists enhancement services and confirms they are included. 5) total_budget provides a complete monthly breakdown (€630.75/month). All are present and fully specified with coverage details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan lists three main items under health_coverage, property_coverage, and travel_coverage — all from the 'LifeFirst Comprehensive Package' series. In the ground-truth data, there are only 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' and 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' entries under health and property, and 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under travel. No 'Comprehensive Package' versions exist, so we must map them to their closest equivalents. Thus, 'LifeFirst Comprehensive Package2' (health and travel) corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (health and travel, rating 8), and 'LifeFirst Comprehensive Package1' (property) corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (property, rating 8).
